title: Market Outlook
text: The annual report describes strong enterprise demand in the North region, especially from logistics and retail accounts. Management expects continued expansion if fulfillment performance stays high.

title: North Region Highlights
text: North region customers showed the strongest renewal intent and the highest average order expansion in the first half of 2024.

title: South Region Highlights
text: South region growth stayed healthy, but expansion deals were more uneven because several large customers delayed procurement.

title: Operations Note
text: The report highlights that product availability and onboarding quality were major factors behind conversion and regional growth.
